metadata.disclaimerShort: Estimates based on statutory parameters (EStG §32a, social insurance ceilings, average add-on rate). Does not replace payroll tax tables for exact wage withholding.

socialContrib.name: Health Insurance
socialContrib.note: Total rate 17.5% (14.6% base + 2.9% average add-on), employee share 8.75%

socialContrib.name: Long-term Care Insurance
socialContrib.note: Base total rate 3.6% (2025+). Childless surcharge +0.6% applies to employee only; Saxony has a different employer/employee split. These are applied in the DE-specific calculator logic.
